content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agents can leverage a dynamic attention gating mechanism adapted from Transformer episodic memory designs to prune noisy, uninformative curiosity-driven exploration traces, retaining only high-value episodic memories that boost sample efficiency for downstream active selection. This gated attention approach automatically down-weights redundant exploration trajectories that curiosity-driven methods (ICM/RND) often overprioritize, turning unstructured exploration history into a curated memory bank that improves sequential active query selection.
source_topics: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
